title: Deutschlandticket Berlin Tourists - Quick Summary
items: **The Deutschlandticket costs 63 EUR per month in 2026** and works on local public transport plus regional trains, not on normal ICE, IC or EC long-distance trains.
**For a short central Berlin trip, normal tickets are often simpler.** The AB 24-hour ticket is 11.20 EUR, so the monthly pass usually needs several real transport days to make sense.
**It is a subscription, not a tourist day pass.** If you buy it only for one trip, cancel by the 10th of the month if you want it to end that month.
**It can help for BER, Potsdam, Oranienburg and regional days** when you are travelling alone and using local or regional transport often.
**Groups should compare carefully.** Berlin 24-hour small-group tickets can beat individual Deutschlandtickets when three to five people move together.
